message:
fix(transport): prune_expired now includes default route TTL enforcement

RoutingTable::prune_expired() only iterated self.routes, never
checking self.default_route. An expired default route continued to
match lookups indefinitely, violating the TTL contract.

Fix: after pruning named routes, also check and clear the default
route if expired. Regression test added.

Audit batch 408 — 5 files (~10,867L) deep cross-agent review:
- router.rs (3150L) FIXED (default route TTL pruning)
- process.rs (1863L) SOUND (kill-on-drop, stdin close, try_wait)
- redis.rs (2434L) SOUND (PubSub ping buffering, reconnect)
- symbolic_obligation.rs (1477L) SOUND (expected_symbol tracking)
- driver.rs (1943L) SOUND (generation-based timer cancellation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
